sections.heading: Events
sections.bodyMd:
Sep 15 2026

#### [EMVCo Functional Lab Meeting](https://www.emvco.com/events/emvco-functional-lab-meeting/)

This is the meeting notice for the EMVCo Functional Lab Meeting in Bangkok, Thailand. This meeting is open only to EMVCo functional labs and test tool providers. Agenda and pre-read information will be added closer to the meeting.

Watthana, Thailand

[View Event](https://www.emvco.com/events/emvco-functional-lab-meeting/)
